jd_text:
Job Title: Project Director – Entertainment DevelopmentLocation: Dubai, UAEClient: Leading Entertainment DeveloperSalary: AED 55,000 + Package
OverviewWe are seeking a highly experienced Project Director to lead the delivery of major entertainment, leisure, and attraction developments in Dubai. This is a client-side leadership role responsible for overseeing complex projects from early concept through to full delivery and operational handover.
Key ResponsibilitiesLead the full lifecycle of projects from concept, feasibility, and creative development through design, procurement, construction, testing & commissioning, and handoverAct as the senior client representative across all stakeholders including creative agencies, consultants, contractors, operators, and IP partnersEnsure alignment between creative vision, technical execution, and operational readinessDevelop and manage project plans, budgets, governance frameworks, and KPIsOversee delivery of complex entertainment components including ride systems, show production, AV/SFX, and themingDrive stakeholder coordination across internal departments including operations, finance, legal, and strategyLead risk management, change control, and dispute resolution at an executive levelEnsure compliance with UAE regulations, safety standards, and licensing requirements
Key Requirements15–20 years of experience in project/program managementMinimum 8–10 years delivering entertainment, attractions, or large-scale leisure developmentsStrong client-side experience, ideally within UAE or GCCProven track record delivering complex, multi-stakeholder projects from inception to completionExperience managing creative, technical, and operational integrationStrong commercial understanding including procurement, contracts, and project economicsPMP, RICS, or similar certifications are advantageous
Key CompetenciesEntertainment project leadershipStakeholder and partner managementCreative and technical integrationOperational readiness and commissioningRisk management and problem solvingExecutive communication and leadership
OpportunityThis is a unique opportunity to lead the delivery of high-profile, world-class entertainment assets within a major developer, playing a key role in shaping guest experiences at scale.
For a confidential discussion, please apply.
